audits.title: Account Currency Control Point — Reference
audits.description: Account currency is State 04 custody—chart assignments decide reconciliation scopes and FX populations, not cosmetic ISO labels.

audits.title: Account Currency in ERP Systems — Reference Architecture
audits.description: Account currency in ERP governs balances, revaluation, reconciliation, reporting, and audit evidence. A reference architecture for enterprise finance.

audits.title: Account Currency vs Ledger Currency — Comparison
audits.description: Account currency configures chart custody; ledger currency hosts trial balance measurement—collapse invites misrouted close and revaluation.

audits.title: Account Currency vs Settlement Currency — Comparison
audits.description: Settlement currency clears liquidity; account currency governs ledger custody—same ISO codes answer distinct treasury versus ERP forensic questions.

audits.title: Account Currency vs Transaction Currency — Comparison
audits.description: State 04 account currency assigns ERP custody; State 02 transaction currency denominates obligations—conflation breaks reconciliation and FX evidence.

audits.title: Strategic Acquisition — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: AccountCcy.com is a sovereign-grade reference asset for enterprise finance. Strategic acquisition inquiries are considered from aligned institutional organizations only.

audits.title: Audit Evidence for Currency State Control — Reference
audits.description: Currency-state audit evidence proves which interpretation governed postings, reconciliations, FX batches, and disclosures—custody chains, not generic checklists.

audits.title: The CCY State Chain — From Quoted Price to Audit Reality
audits.description: The CCY State Chain maps currency as institutional states—not static ISO codes—from ERP custody through ledger, FX, translation, reporting, to audit reconstruction.

audits.title: The CFO Guide to Hidden Account Currency Risk — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: CFO governance layer for monetary truth—ERP custody, FX revaluation vs translation, reporting integrity, audit reconstruction—not treasury FX alone.

audits.title: Account Currency vs Reporting Currency — Key Differences
audits.description: Account currency vs reporting currency: custody of maintained balances versus presentation of measured results in enterprise finance.

audits.title: Currency Control Exceptions — Reference
audits.description: Currency-control exceptions flag fractures—transaction vs settlement, ledger vs reporting, stale FX, lingering reconciliations—before assurance debt hardens.

audits.title: Currency State Audit Trail — Reference
audits.description: A currency-state audit trail reconstructs capture-through-consolidation custody—reproducible evidence paired with ledger exports.

audits.title: Currency State Control Risk — Reference
audits.description: Currency-state confusion accumulates assurance debt across ERP, reconciliation, FX, and reporting—this synthesizes institutional failure modes.

audits.title: Currency State Diagnostic — Account Currency Control Maturity
audits.description: Assess your organization's account currency control maturity across the CCY State Chain — from Quoted Currency to Audit Reality.

audits.title: ERP Currency Configuration Control — Reference
audits.description: ERP currency configuration encodes currency-state behavior inside posting engines—custody infrastructure, not implementation advice.

audits.title: The Currency State Control Framework — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: Layered custody map for multi-currency accounting—identity through ledger, FX, translation, reporting, audit reconstruction. AccountCcy Framework.

audits.title: Functional Currency Explained — Definition, Determination, and Control
audits.description: Functional currency explained as a measurement lens distinct from account, ledger, and reporting currency inside enterprise finance.

audits.title: Functional Currency vs Reporting Currency — Comparison
audits.description: Functional currency anchors measurement; reporting currency frames presentation—mixing them misroutes translation equity, rates, and disclosure bridges.

audits.title: FX Control Evidence — Reference
audits.description: FX control evidence reconstructs revaluation lineage: rates, timing, populations, realized vs unrealized split, approvals, postings, and reporting interpretation.

audits.title: FX Revaluation Control — Reference
audits.description: FX revaluation control governs remeasurement populations, rate lineage, and batch integrity—distinct from translation or realized FX narratives.

audits.title: Account Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Account currency assigns ERP custody for balances — State 04 control gate inside enterprise finance.

audits.title: Account Currency Control — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Account currency control is governance over ERP custody assignments—not occasional reconciliation heroics.

audits.title: Account Mapping — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Account mapping connects source events and subledger detail to GL accounts, reporting lines, and consolidation schedules.

audits.title: Audit Defensibility — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Audit defensibility asks whether reported monetary values withstand evidence, policy, rate logic, ledger context, and state-history scrutiny.

audits.title: Audit Reality — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Audit reality is defensible monetary truth — terminal CCY State Chain posture traceable from quote through consolidation.

audits.title: Audit Trail — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Audit trail names the reconstructable record across currency states, ledger treatment, FX, translation, reporting, and evidence—not passive system logs alone.

audits.title: Chain of Custody — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Chain of custody in finance is the ordered evidence path monetary signals follow before becoming truth.

audits.title: Consolidation Adjustment — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Consolidation adjustment records group-level reshaping—eliminations, translation ties, ownership mechanics—after subsidiary proofs exist.

audits.title: Consolidation Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Consolidation currency unifies group reporting — State 07 absorbing translations, eliminations, ownership drift.

audits.title: Control Evidence — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Control evidence is the corpus that proves currency states, transformations, rates, and reporting presentations can be defended—not merely asserted.

audits.title: Currency Exposure — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Currency exposure names monetary risk spanning quotation, obligation, settlement, and reporting—where custody ambiguity amplifies FX outcomes.

audits.title: Currency Master Data — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Currency master data governs codes, precision, rounding, activation rules, and ERP treatment inherited by posting and FX routines.

audits.title: Currency State — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: A currency state is a named phase where enterprise finance assigns monetary identity—distinct from ‘currency’ alone.

audits.title: Currency State Control Framework — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: The Currency State Control Framework governs monetary custody across currency states—not FX slogans alone.

audits.title: Currency Translation — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Currency translation converts measured results into presentation currency—State 06 visibility discipline.

audits.title: ERP Currency Configuration — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: ERP currency configuration governs account currency, ledger currency, revaluation rules, rate consumption, and translation-ready behavior.

audits.title: Evidence Trail — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Evidence trail is the governed path of supporting records finance, audit, and control teams use to reconstruct monetary truth across systems.

audits.title: Exchange Rate Source — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Exchange rate source names the governed authority for FX rates—revaluation, translation, consolidation—not informal screenshots or desk anecdotes.

audits.title: Functional Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Functional currency names the primary economic environment lens—typically aligning ledger measurement.

audits.title: FX Revaluation — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: FX revaluation restates monetary balances to ledger currency at period boundaries—State 05 custody mechanics.

audits.title: General Ledger — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: General ledger is the central ledger where posted balances, account currency context, functional measurement, and period FX discipline converge.

audits.title: Account Currency Glossary — Enterprise Finance Reference
audits.description: Conceptual authority map — custody doctrine, currency-state architecture, accounting controls, FX mechanics, ERP ledger system discipline, audit-facing reporting.

audits.title: Ledger Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Ledger currency houses the entity trial balance — State 05 aligned with functional books discipline.

audits.title: Monetary Ambiguity — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Monetary ambiguity is custody risk when currency state, account context, FX logic, or reporting presentation cannot be clearly reconstructed.

audits.title: Monetary Reconstruction — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Monetary reconstruction rebuilds custody from source events through account currency, ledger FX, translation, reporting, and audit-ready evidence.

audits.title: Monetary Truth — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Monetary truth is accounting-defensible money figures traceable through custody—not optimism or dashboards alone.

audits.title: Period-End Revaluation — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Period-end revaluation applies governed FX rates at reporting cut-off to open monetary balances—binding account custody to ledger measurement outcomes.

audits.title: Posting Logic — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Posting logic defines how monetary events become journals across accounts, currencies, periods, dimensions, and downstream reporting paths.

audits.title: Quoted Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Quoted currency names the FX lens before obligation exists — State 01 of the CCY State Chain.

audits.title: Realized FX — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Realized FX names exchange differences crystallized through settlement, payment, receipt, or closure—not unrealized revaluation on still-open balances.

audits.title: Remeasurement — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Remeasurement restates monetary items when measurement currency or accounting basis changes—not presentation translation dressed as operational FX hygiene.

audits.title: Reporting Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Reporting currency frames outward visibility — State 06 where translation policy reshapes disclosed narratives.

audits.title: Reporting Integrity — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Reporting integrity preserves monetary lineage so reporting currency cannot flatten or conceal prior currency-state transformations.

audits.title: Settlement Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Settlement currency is the denomination of cash movement — State 03 bridging obligation to liquidity.

audits.title: Source System — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Source system is where monetary events first enter enterprise finance—before governed posting, mapping, and ledger summarization.

audits.title: State Ownership — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: State ownership names which system, ledger, process, or control layer owns a currency state at a moment—preventing silent drift between teams.

audits.title: Subledger — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Subledger holds detailed receivable, payable, asset, or inventory accounting before controlled roll-up into the general ledger.

audits.title: System of Record — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: System of record names the authoritative finance application owning monetary balances, currency assignments, and posting truth for custody.

audits.title: Transaction Currency — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Transaction currency denominates the recorded obligation — State 02 where measurable duties begin.

audits.title: Translation Adjustment — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Translation adjustment accumulates equity impacts when financial statements convert into reporting currency—distinct from ledger revaluation mechanics.

audits.title: Unrealized FX — AccountCcy.com Glossary
audits.description: Unrealized FX recognizes exchange movement before settlement—typically via period-end revaluation governed by rate lineage on monetary items.

audits.title: AccountCcy.com — The Chain of Custody for Monetary Truth
audits.description: Account currency reference stack—definition entry, State 04 custody, CCY chain, framework, doctrine, glossary—for monetary lineage in enterprise finance.

audits.title: Ledger Currency Control — Reference
audits.description: Ledger currency control proves trial balance coherence, posting lineage, and close discipline before translation narrates outward visibility.

audits.title: Ledger Currency vs Reporting Currency — Comparison
audits.description: Ledger currency safeguards TB measurement; reporting currency presents statements—presentation must reconcile to ledger proofs, not replace them.

audits.title: The Chain of Custody for Monetary Truth — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: Monetary truth is custody across currency states, ledger rules, FX, translation, and audit evidence—not isolated figures. AccountCcy.com maps enterprise lineage.

audits.title: Monetary Truth Close Discipline — Reference
audits.description: Close discipline turns monetary ambiguity into defensible truth via freeze choreography, contemporaneous evidence, and accountable custody transitions—not improvisation.

audits.title: Multi-Currency Reconciliation Control — Reference
audits.description: Multi-currency reconciliation must reconcile currency-state lineage, not only totals—obligation, liquidity, custody, measurement, visibility.

audits.title: Period-End Currency Close Control — Reference
audits.description: Period-end close freezes ERP custody, ledger measurement, FX, reconciliation, and reporting translation together—immutable lineage and disciplined review.

audits.title: Reporting Currency vs Consolidation Currency — Comparison
audits.description: Reporting currency reveals entity results; consolidation currency builds group statements—eliminations sit only at the group lens.

audits.title: Foreign Currency Revaluation and Translation — AccountCcy.com
audits.description: Foreign currency revaluation vs translation explained through ledger measurement, reporting presentation, and audit evidence.

audits.title: Account Currency Misconfiguration — Risk and Control
audits.description: Account currency misconfiguration risk in ERP: configuration drift, wrong FX populations, weak reconciliation, and audit evidence gaps.

audits.title: Account Currency — State 04 — The Critical Control Point
audits.description: State 04 Account Currency: ERP custody identity for balances—not transaction labels—bridging settlement into ledger, FX, translation, audit lineage.

audits.title: Audit Reality — State 08 — The Terminal State of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Audit reality: monetary figures traceable, reconciled, and defensible under scrutiny — the terminal custody state of the CCY State Chain.

audits.title: Consolidation Currency — State 07 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Consolidation currency unifies entity reporting into the group currency. State 07 — peak FX translation complexity before audit narratives finalize.

audits.title: Ledger Currency — State 05 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Ledger currency is State 05 GL measurement—subledger roll-ups, posting logic, functional alignment, valuation batches—before reporting translation refracts narratives.

audits.title: Quoted Currency — State 01 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Quoted currency expresses market prices before obligation — State 01 before accounting custody in the CCY State Chain.

audits.title: Reporting Currency — State 06 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Reporting currency is State 06 presentation lens—translation bridges, CFO packs, filings—after disciplined ledger measurement and before consolidation altitude.

audits.title: Settlement Currency — State 03 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Settlement currency is State 03 liquidity denomination—cash and clearing—where realized FX begins when rails diverge from obligation currency.

audits.title: Transaction Currency — State 02 of the CCY State Chain
audits.description: Transaction currency is State 02 obligation denomination—contracts and invoices—before ERP custody, settlement rails, or GL measurement absorb exposure.

audits.title: What Is Account Currency? — Definition and Control Discipline
audits.description: Account currency assigns ERP custody to balances—State 04—for reconciliation, FX close, and audit reconstruction—not superficial ISO styling.
